content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt explicitly calls the build a "public beta" and says "expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2).
Pierre: Apple requires the App Store build to be presented as a finished product, not a beta test—this exact phrasing ("public beta", "still testing", "expect rough edges") is a red flag reviewers look for under 2.2. Rewrite the release notes to describe the sync feature as a shipped, supported feature (e.g. "New: background sync") without hedging language, and reserve actual beta testing for TestFlight.
